title: Integration for Bitbucket® - connect business and development teams

posts.author: EBeer (Elise Beer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com community!

We are happy to announce a new integration between monday.com and Bitbucket. This integration for Bitbucket® allows you to connect Bitbucket issues (not Jira issues) and monday.com items. Improve collaboration between your business and developer teams by working more efficient!

image1920×960 24.8 KB

As of now, the app includes the following recipes:

  • When an item is created in monday.com, create an issue in this Bitbucket repository from this Bitbucket workspace
  • When a status changes to something, create an issue in this Bitbucket repository from this Bitbucket workspace
  • When an issue is created in this Bitbucket repository from this Bitbucket workspace, create an item and sync future changes from Bitbucket
  • When a commit of this Bitbucket repository from this Bitbucket workspace is pushed to this branch, create an item
  • When a commit of this Bitbucket repository from this Bitbucket workspace is pushed to this branch, create an update in this item

Read our documentation or install the app directly from the marketplace

About us

Avisi apps is part of Avisi, we’ve recently become a partner of monday.com. This is the second app we launch in the marketplace. We believe in the best tooling to support software developments teams and like to fill gaps in tooling.

How to send us feedback:

We’re are always open for suggestions/ improvements. Feel free to raise questions about the integration via monday@avisi-apps.com or apply in our support portal.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @EBeer,

Thank you so much for sharing this app with the community! I’m sure this would help users who are using both BitBucket and monday.com work even more efficiently.

I hope this will be a welcome app all around

-Alex
